gene_description: Metabolizes ~25% of all drugs (codeine, tamoxifen, antidepressants)

source.title: PharmGKB summary: very important pharmacogene information for CYP2D6
source.finding: CYP2D6 metabolizes ~25% of clinically used drugs. Poor metabolizers at risk for toxicity or therapeutic failure.

AA.effect: No CYP2D6 activity. Codeine has no analgesic effect; risk of toxicity with other substrates.
AA.recommendation: Avoid codeine/tramadol (no conversion to active metabolite). Reduce dose of SSRIs, antipsychotics.

AG.effect: Reduced CYP2D6 activity. Partial drug metabolism.
AG.recommendation: Consider dose reduction for CYP2D6 substrates. Monitor for side effects.
